email_body:
Beste team,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Content Creator / Marketing (Social Media). Uw visie om een AI-native advocatenkantoor op te bouwen spreekt mij enorm aan. Als junior digital marketer met ervaring in SEO, GEO en contentcreatie, geloof ik dat ik kan bijdragen aan het vertellen van uw verhaal op een manier die blijft hangen.

Op mijn eigen project mirook.com heb ik sociale media (Instagram, Facebook) geïntegreerd en content gemaakt die complexe onderwerpen toegankelijk maakt. Bij Episto schrijf ik SEO-gerichte blogs en beheer ik WordPress-sites. Ik ben gewend om content van idee tot publicatie te beheren, en ik experimenteer graag met formats en trends.

Ik woon in Zwijndrecht, vlakbij Antwerpen, en ben flexibel voor hybride werk in Brussel. Mijn Nederlands is B1, maar ik volg lessen om het verder te verbeteren. Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks.

Ik voeg mijn cv en motivatiebrief bij. Ik hoor graag of we kunnen kennismaken.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear team,

I am very excited to apply for the Content Creator / Marketing (Social Media) role. Your vision of building an AI-native law firm truly resonates with me. As a junior digital marketer with experience in SEO, GEO, and content creation, I believe I can help tell your story in a compelling way.

On my own project mirook.com, I integrated social media (Instagram, Facebook) and created content that makes complex topics accessible. At Episto, I write SEO-focused blogs and manage WordPress sites. I am used to owning content end to end, from idea to publication, and I love experimenting with formats and trends.

I live in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp, and am flexible for hybrid work in Brussels. My Dutch is B1, but I am taking classes to improve. I am fluent in English and Turkish.

I have attached my CV and cover letter. I would love to meet and discuss how I can contribute.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste heer/mevrouw,

Toen ik de vacature voor Content Creator / Marketing (Social Media) bij uw AI-native advocatenkantoor zag, voelde ik direct een klik. U bouwt een merk dat juridische expertise combineert met AI — een verhaal dat ik graag help vertellen via sociale media en content.

Als junior digital marketer met een technische achtergrond in webdesign en SEO, begrijp ik hoe je complexe onderwerpen toegankelijk maakt. Op mirook.com, mijn eigen project, creëer ik content voor Instagram en Facebook, en optimaliseer ik de vindbaarheid via zowel traditionele als AI-gestuurde zoekmachines. Ik heb ervaring met short-form video, visuele content en het monitoren van prestaties om te zien wat werkt.

Bij Episto schrijf ik wekelijks SEO-blogs en beheer ik WordPress-sites. Ik werk zelfstandig van idee tot publicatie, en ik pas me snel aan nieuwe tools en trends aan. Uw vraag naar iemand die experimenteert en leert van data past perfect bij mijn werkwijze.

Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 (met wekelijkse lessen). Ik woon in Zwijndrecht, vlakbij Antwerpen, en ben beschikbaar voor hybride werk in Brussel.

Ik zou graag in een gesprek toelichten hoe ik uw merk kan helpen groeien. Bijgevoegd vindt u mijn cv. Ik hoor graag van u.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear Sir/Madam,

When I saw the vacancy for Content Creator / Marketing (Social Media) at your AI-native law firm, I felt an immediate connection. You are building a brand that combines legal expertise with AI — a story I would love to help tell through social media and content.

As a junior digital marketer with a technical background in web design and SEO, I understand how to make complex topics accessible. On mirook.com, my own project, I create content for Instagram and Facebook, and optimize visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. I have experience with short-form video, visual content, and tracking performance to see what works.

At Episto, I write weekly SEO blogs and manage WordPress sites. I work independently from idea to publication, and I quickly adapt to new tools and trends. Your need for someone who experiments and learns from data fits my approach perfectly.

I am fluent in English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 (with weekly lessons). I live in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp, and am available for hybrid work in Brussels.

I would love to discuss how I can help grow your brand. Please find my CV attached. I look forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
- Content creation for social media: integrated Instagram/Facebook on mirook.com, created engaging visuals and short-form content
- SEO & GEO expertise: optimized content for both traditional and AI-powered search engines, making complex topics accessible
- End-to-end content ownership: from idea to publication for blogs and websites at Episto and mirook.com
- Experimentation and data-driven: track performance with analytics tools and double down on what works
- Comfortable with video and visuals: used Canva and AI tools for content creation; quick to learn new formats and trends
tailored_cv:
# Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

## Profile
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). At Episto, I run on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and full-cycle WordPress site build and maintenance for client sites. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable across content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms, and growing into analytics, e-commerce content management, and campaign support. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

## Core skills
- Social media content & integration: Instagram, Facebook, short-form video, visual content creation
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

## Experience

### Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

### Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

### Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

## Projects

### mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

## Education
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

## References
Available on request.
